title: verbascum × roopianum
intro: Verbascum × roopianum, also known as the hybrid mullein or Verbascum × hybrida, is a hybrid plant species that results from the cross between Verbascum thapsus and Verbascum chaixii. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, particularly in the treatment of respiratory issues such as bronchitis, asthma, and coughs, as well as its antiseptic and anti-inflammatory properties. The health benefits of Verbascum × roopianum include its ability to soothe sore throats, reduce fever, and promote wound healing, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies. Traditionally, the leaves and flowers of the plant are used in herbal preparations, such as teas, infusions, and salves, to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
